display_text: Titanic, Cost: 0: Neutral item enhancing other items by adding a percentage bonus to base attack damage and status resistance. This effect does not have an active ability or cooldown and is applied passively as an enhancement. Stats: Base Attack Damage Bonus: +10% / +20%, Status Resistance Bonus: +10% / +15%.
